backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management, user profiles with Google OAuth and YouTube channel authentication, access control with admin roles, clip similarity scoring, engagement analytics, and HTTP outcalls for YouTube API integration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades user profiles from the old schema to include the new googleOAuthCredentials field while preserving existing videoClips, userProfiles, and adminPrincipals data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: Google OAuth integration in ChannelConnection component and YouTube post button disabling in ClipCard when Google account is not connected.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, and configuration, detailing OAuth callback routing, clip management, YouTube integration, admin functionality, and UI styling.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark modes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with the title "Beast Clipping" and a root div for mounting the app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with routing (including OAuth callback), authentication flow, profile setup, video URL management, AI clip suggestions state, and layout integration with ChannelConnection and AdminPanel components.
Debug panel component for administrators displaying authentication state, principal comparisons, admin list, HashMap size, initialization status, and character-by-character string comparison for troubleshooting access control issues.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error messages, stack traces, and recovery options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a list of current admin users with their Principal IDs, showing loading states, error handling, and short user ID generation for each admin.
Form component for adding new admins by Principal ID with validation, success/error feedback, and includes the AdminList component to show current admins.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard displaying statistics (total clips, trending analytics), admin management, and a collapsible debug panel with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Manages YouTube channel connection via Google OAuth, displaying connection status with channel info and providing connect/disconnect functionality.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component displaying video clip details with thumbnail, viral score, duration, and actions for deletion, YouTube posting, and downloading with appropriate state handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of saved video clips with loading states, empty states, and delete functionality. Allows users to select clips and shows the total count of saved clips.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores, timestamps, and durations. Provides buttons to apply suggested clips with their timestamps and titles to the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes and seconds). Handles clip creation, validation, and updates form fields when clips or suggestions are selected.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing logo, authentication controls, and conditional admin button. Manages Internet Identity login/logout and includes debug logging for admin access visibility.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form requiring name and email input for new users. Validates email format and saves profile data (currently concatenating name and email as a workaround) before allowing access to the app.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays both a short user ID and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons. Shows visual feedback when IDs are copied and truncates the principal ID for space efficiency.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs, validating them, loading videos, and triggering AI-powered clip generation with loading states and error handling.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score (0-100) with color-coded styling, icons, and labels based on score thresholds (high/medium/low).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple YouTube video player component that embeds an iframe with a given video ID in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio card.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated states, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Mutation hook for adding admin users by user ID, invalidating admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Query hook that fetches admin debug information including current principal, admin status, and admin list (currently returns placeholder data as backend method is not yet implemented).
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend using the getAdminsAsAdmin method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Query hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend.
Mutation hook that generates AI-powered clip suggestions for a video, currently using mock data but designed to integrate with real AI services in the future.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook for creating video clips with automatic viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics, invalidating clip queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Query hook for fetching all clips and mutation hook for deleting clips, with loading state tracking for individual clip deletions.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook for managing clip start/end timestamps with validation, formatting, and conversion between minutes/seconds and total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Mutation hook that generates a download URL for a video clip and triggers browser download with a sanitized filename based on title and timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React Query hook that checks if the current user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin() method, with extensive debug logging and state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook for posting video clips to YouTube, validating OAuth connection and 60-second duration limit for YouTube Shorts before uploading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profile management, Google OAuth status checks, and YouTube channel connection state with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Simple React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Manages YouTube channel connection status and OAuth flow, including mutations for connecting/disconnecting channels via Google OAuth with required YouTube scopes.
Utility hook providing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using HSL color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: OAuth callback page that processes Google authorization codes, validates state parameters, stores credentials via backend, and redirects users with status feedback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Generates deterministic 8-character user IDs from principal strings using a simple hash function.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for tracking and logging YouTube OAuth flow events, validating OAuth responses, and diagnosing common authentication errors.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme settings, typography and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a YouTube clip management app with Google OAuth integration, listing existing features, pending feature requests, and known issues.
